name: storage-proxy
description: Authenticated proxy for Azure Blob Storage or AWS S3 Buckets with Entra ID

scripts.start: bun run build && NODE_ENV=production bun run ./dist/src/app.js
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n AZ,MOTO -c magenta,cyan "bun run azurite" "bun run moto" || true
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVICES,WAIT,NODE -c yellow,gray,green -k "bun run dev:services" "bun run dev:wait && bun run dev:nodemon"
scripts.test: concurrently --success=first --kill-others -n SERVICES,WAIT,NODE -c yellow,gray,green "bun run dev:services" "bun run dev:wait && bun test tests/app.test.ts"
